summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BNI Prezenta App (Romanian attendance management). All backend tests (27/27) passed. All frontend features tested and working correctly: JWT login, dashboard with members/guests tables, attendance checkbox saves without page reload, green highlighting for prezent, taxa input saves to DB, guest CRUD operations, înlocuitor logic with yellow/blue highlighting, Projector page, Settings page with Export/Import/Email settings.
passed_tests: Backend - Login with admin/admin123 credentials (200 OK)
Backend - Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend - GET /api/auth/me returns user info
Backend - GET /api/members returns sorted list
Backend - POST /api/members creates new member
Backend - Members sorted alphabetically by prenume, nume
Backend - POST /api/guests creates guest
Backend - PUT /api/guests updates prezent status
Backend - PUT /api/guests updates is_inlocuitor status
Backend - GET /api/attendance/{date} returns daily data
Backend - GET /api/attendance/dates/list returns dates
Backend - POST /api/attendance/{date} updates attendance
Backend - GET /api/export returns versioned JSON
Backend - POST /api/import accepts valid JSON
Backend - Export/Import roundtrip successful
Backend - Export/Import require authentication
Frontend - Login page loads correctly with Romanian text
Frontend - Login with admin/admin123 redirects to dashboard
Frontend - Dashboard displays date in Romanian format (Miercuri, 11 februarie 2026)
Frontend - Members table displays with correct columns (NR, PRENUME, NUME, ÎNLOCUITOR, PREZ, TAXA, TOTAL LUNĂ)
Frontend - Attendance checkbox click saves to DB without page reload
Frontend - Green highlighting (bg-green-100) applied when member is prezent
Frontend - Taxa input saves value to DB and updates total
Frontend - Add guest form works correctly
Frontend - Guest prezent checkbox works
Frontend - Înlocuitor checkbox enabled only when guest has invitat_de set
Frontend - Yellow highlighting (bg-yellow-100) applied to member when they have an înlocuitor
Frontend - Blue highlighting (bg-blue-50) applied to guest marked as înlocuitor
Frontend - Înlocuitor name displayed in member's ÎNLOCUITOR column
Frontend - Member's prezent checkbox disabled when they have an înlocuitor
Frontend - Delete guest button works
Frontend - Date picker opens Romanian calendar
Frontend - Projector button present
Frontend - Export PDF button present
Frontend - Projector page displays present members correctly
Frontend - Settings page accessible with Export/Import buttons
Frontend - Settings page has Email settings section
Frontend - Settings page has Password change section
Frontend - Navigation between Dashboard and Settings works
seed_data_creation: Created 5 test members (Adam Maksay, Andrei Georgescu, Elena Vasilescu, Ion Popescu, Maria Ionescu) and test guests for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs fully tested with pytest. Frontend UI verified with Playwright. Green highlighting for prezent works. Yellow highlighting for înlocuitor on member works. Blue highlighting for înlocuitor guest works. Sidebar toggle works. Export/Import on Settings page works. Projector page shows present members. Email sending is MOCKED (requires SMTP configuration).

features_verified.dashboard_membri_table: Working - displays members sorted alphabetically with PREZ, TAXA, TOTAL LUNĂ columns
features_verified.dashboard_invitati_table: Working - displays guests with add form, PREZ, ÎNLOC checkboxes
features_verified.attendance_save_without_reload: Working - checkbox click saves to DB via API without page reload
features_verified.yellow_highlighting: Working - bg-yellow-100 applied when member has înlocuitor
features_verified.blue_highlighting: Working - bg-blue-50 applied when guest is_inlocuitor=true
features_verified.taxa_save: Working - input updates taxa, recalculates totals, saves to DB
features_verified.add_guest: Working - form adds guest with invitat_de selection
features_verified.inlocuitor_logic: Working - checkbox enabled only with invitat_de, updates member row with înlocuitor name, disables member prezent checkbox
features_verified.date_picker: Working - Romanian calendar, date selection loads correct data
features_verified.projector_page: Working - displays present members/guests for selected date
features_verified.settings_email: Working - email settings can be added/saved

mocked_apis.email_sending: MOCKED - /api/send-pdf-email requires SMTP configuration (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASSWORD) which is not set in preview environment
